content.en:
No matter what the strength of the Lord of the Agu Kingdom and the Lord of Qingyuan was, it had nothing to do with Ye Tian.

He only wanted to break through the Eternal Dao to the realm of more than seventy percent now, and then seek the inheritance knowledge of the higher realm.

Ancient Castle.

Ye Tian spent a hundred ancient coins in a shop on this day to buy a simple inheritance knowledge, involving some secret knowledge of the Eternal Dao Transformation and the Eternal Dao Realm, at least he would not go the wrong way.

But such knowledge can be replicated, so it is not expensive.

After obtaining this inheritance knowledge, Ye Tian finally knew that he could not break through to seventy percent of the eternal Dao.

It's not that he can't do it with natural qualifications, it's not that he lacks resources, it's that he lacks the Eternal Dao Secret Technique.

The Eternal Dao Secret Technique is a secret technique that can only be practiced by the rules of the Eternal Sequence Dao, that is to say, without comprehending the rules of the Eternal Sequence Dao, there is no way to break through to the realm of Seventy Percent Eternal Dao.

Therefore, in the ancient realm, many of the Eternal Dao Transformations are in the middle stage, and if they can't step into the late stage, they can't comprehend the rules of the Eternal Sequence Dao.

In the Ancient Realm, the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item was also a supreme treasure that they could only dream of and could not obtain.

"I have comprehended the rules of the Eternal Sequence to the Dao, and even comprehended the Ten Percent Realm, but now I only lack the Eternal Immortal Dao Secret Technique!" Ye Tian muttered.

But it was clear that the value of any kind of Eternal Dao Secret Technique was incomparably expensive.

He went to all the shops and inquired, but none of them sold the Eternal Dao Secret Technique.

The main thing is that the forces that control the Eternal Dao Secret Technique will be kept strictly secret, and even if they obtain the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, they will make an oath.

Therefore, the Eternal Dao Secret Technique has not been circulated.

Each faction has its own Eternal Dao Secret Technique, and if you want to obtain the Eternal Dao Transformation, you must join these forces, and then serve them for endless years before you can hope to obtain the Eternal Dao Secret Technique.

If the Eternal Dao Secret Technique spreads, how can these forces recruit the strong?

In the ancient kingdom, the easiest place to obtain the Eternal Dao Secret Technique is undoubtedly the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, as long as you join the Ao Gu Army and serve the 10 billion Solses, you will inevitably be able to obtain an Eternal Dao Secret Technique, even if you don't have any merit.

However, after joining the Ogu Army, you must make an oath to serve your life, and you will never betray the Oku Lord.

The eternal Daoist powerhouse who longs for freedom naturally does not want to join the Agu Army.

Moreover, even if you join the Ancient Army and obtain the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, if you can't comprehend the rules of the Eternal Sequence Dao, you still can't break through to the late stage of Eternity Dao.

Ye Tian inquired about the recruitment conditions of the major forces in the Agu Kingdom, and almost all of them needed to make an oath and take a long time of allegiance before they could obtain the Eternal Dao Secret Technique.

"Forget it, these forces are unreliable, it is too troublesome and a waste of time to obtain the Eternal Dao Transformation Secret Technique from them!"

Ye Tian chose to give up.

He looked to see if there was a declining force, but he had the Eternal Dao Secret Technique in his hand, in this case, the chance of obtaining the Eternal Dao Secret Technique would be much greater.

As a result, he really found such a force.

【Luoxia Pavilion】

This force was also a very powerful force a long time ago, with an Eternal Dao Realm and more than ten Eternal Dao Late Stage powerhouses, but an accident caused the Eternal Dao Realm in Luoxia Pavilion to fall, and several Eternal Dao Late Stage powerhouses fell.

After that, a powerhouse named Eternal to the late stage of Daohua chose to leave.

At present, there is only one powerhouse in Luoxia Pavilion left, and more than a dozen powerhouses in the early and middle stages of Eternal Daoization, and their power has been greatly weakened.

What's more, Luo Xia Pavilion is now in crisis and is in danger of destruction.

Therefore, Luo Xia Pavilion is also recruiting strong people to tide over the crisis, and the rewards paid are the Eternal Dao Secret Technique.

However, the hostile forces of Luoxia Pavilion also let out dangerous words, so there are very few Eternal Daoist powerhouses who are willing to join Luoxia Pavilion.

"Let's join Luoxia Pavilion first!"

Ye Tian decided.

Because Luo Xia Pavilion is to join the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, it is not possible to join other forces.

......

Luoxia Pavilion is located in the city of Roselle in the country of Ogu.

Ye Tian rushed from Guluo City to Luoshen City and came to the headquarters of Luoxia Pavilion.

As soon as he entered the Luoxia Pavilion headquarters, Ye Tian was going to join Luoxia Pavilion.

Luoxia Pavilion, deep in the headquarters.

A woman was going through the formalities for Ye Tian to join Luoxia Pavilion.

"Ye Tian, Eternal to the mid-Dao realm, are you sure you want to join Luoxia Pavilion?"

This woman is Luo Wushuang, the pavilion master of Luoxia Pavilion, and the daughter of the previous pavilion master, and she is eternal to the middle realm of Taoism.

"Yes, but I hope that after joining Luoxia Pavilion, I can obtain the Eternal Dao Secret Technique!" Ye Tian said.

"Yes!" Luo Wushuang agreed, "However, after joining Luo Xia Pavilion, you are not allowed to leave within the 100 million Supreme Dao Era, and the Eternal Supreme Dao Secret Technique obtained is only allowed to be comprehended by yourself, not allowed to be passed on, and you need to make an oath." "

"Yes!"

Ye Tianying said.

After confirming that it was correct, Ye Tian signed an oath agreement with Luo Xia Pavilion.

In this way, Ye Tian successfully joined Luoxia Pavilion.

......

"Ye Tian, this is our Luoxia Pavilion's Eternal Dao Transformation Secret Technique-Luoxia Light!"

"Make a vow, and you can get this inheritance!"

Ye Tian made an oath, and then accepted the inheritance of Luoxia's light.

Soon, he received the light of Luoxia.

After obtaining this inheritance, Ye Tian knew that it was very easy to rely on the light of Luoxia to carry out the Eternal Daoization, and become the early realm of the Eternal Dao, and it was also easy to become the middle realm of the Eternal Dao.

Like Ye Tian, with the First Elder and the First Demon Venerable, they all relied on mythical spiritual objects to forcibly carry out the eternal Dao.

This is a waste of resources and slow to be efficient.

For example, the first elder, it took a long time to reach the eternal Taoism of the Sancheng realm.

But in reality, which force is willing to pay such a big price?

And with the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, you can save ten times or even more resources.

"It would have been great if we had obtained the Eternal Dao Secret Technique like Luo Xia's Light earlier!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He comprehended the light of Luoxia in Luoxia Pavilion, and it was easy to practice.

Next, he needed to use Luoxia's light to break through his bottleneck and break through to the realm of the late stage of eternity and Taoism.
